text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, today's your birthday, isn't it? Happy
birthday.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, what a great honor it is to receive sweet
words of congratulations from you... Though...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What is it? This should be a wonderful day for
you. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To celebrate this grand anniversary of my birth, I
have indeed prepared an opera...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, due perhaps to my overwhelming brilliance,
no one is able to bear witness to it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you couldn't get an audience. I think I can
understand why.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your birthday isn't the only time you perform.
People must've thought this is another of your
many shows.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, yes, my performances are always a sight to behold, but I may have failed to communicate how today's is a cut above the rest...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So be it! Let us put our minds together to solve
this! Once we carry out our bold and ambitious
plan, all shall know they stand to see the opera of
a century!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... What did I do? I think I've said something I'm
most certainly going to regret.
